javadoc_after:
/** Set the initial value of the Jacobian matrix with respect to state. *

* If this method is not called, the initial value of the Jacobian * matrix with respect to state is set to identity. *

* @param dYdY0 initial Jacobian matrix w.r.t. state * @exception IllegalArgumentException if matrix dimensions are incorrect */
